overall.description: First-person exploration through a concrete urban drainage channel in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The camera moves steadily forward beneath overpasses and past graffiti-covered walls and scattered garbage piles under hazy daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage channel beneath highway overpass

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward through the drainage channel beneath the overpass structure

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass with metal railings spanning the channel
scattered piles of blue and black garbage bags accumulated against the sloped wall
concrete sloped wall covered with colorful graffiti tags and spray paint
wet concrete drainage channel floor with puddles reflecting the sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive concrete highway overpass in a drainage channel. Piles of garbage bags line the right side against a graffiti-covered sloped wall. The camera moves forward steadily through the sheltered space, approaching the support pillars of the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete drainage channel with graffiti walls

events.description: passes under the main overpass into the open channel section with full sky visibility

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the open channel, passing graffiti-covered walls on the left

entered.detail: vertical concrete retaining wall covered in dense colorful graffiti and street art
dark industrial structures and smokestacks visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the overpass, the scene opens into a wide concrete channel with a graffiti-covered wall on the left and industrial buildings visible in the hazy distance. The camera continues moving forward through the empty drainage channel.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered drainage channel wall with utility pipes

events.description: camera turns left to approach the graffiti-covered wall closely
camera turns back to center, resuming forward direction toward distant bridge

agents.ego_description: turning toward the left wall to inspect the graffiti up close, then turning back to continue forward

entered.detail: large beige industrial drainage pipes mounted on the concrete wall
low concrete bridge structure with circular drainage holes spanning the channel

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to approach the graffiti-covered wall closely, revealing detailed street art and large industrial drainage pipes. After inspecting the wall, it turns back toward the center of the channel and continues forward toward a secondary concrete bridge structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: drainage channel passing under secondary bridge with abandoned vehicle

events.description: abandoned vehicle comes into view parked under the distant bridge structure
passes under the secondary concrete bridge with circular openings

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing an abandoned vehicle parked under the bridge structure

notable_agents.action: abandoned red vehicle parked stationary under the bridge

entered.detail: derelict red car parked in the channel beneath the secondary bridge

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a secondary concrete bridge with an abandoned red vehicle visible beneath it. The camera passes under the low bridge structure, moving past the derelict car on the right side, and continues through the endless concrete channel toward the industrial horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a concrete drainage channel that transitions from the shelter of a massive overpass to an open industrial wasteland. It begins beneath a heavy highway bridge, gliding past piles of garbage bags and graffiti-covered slopes toward the support pillars. As the camera emerges from under the overpass, the space opens into a wide channel with industrial buildings appearing through the hazy distance. The perspective then shifts left to closely inspect detailed street art and large drainage pipes before turning back toward the center of the path. Finally, the camera approaches a secondary concrete bridge, passing a derelict red vehicle on the right as it continues toward the distant industrial horizon.
